body: Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from earlier this month — I wanted to circle back on the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) deal now that their Series A terms are starting to take shape. I know you mentioned [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) had some reservations about the grid-balancing software side of the business, but I think the updated deck addresses a lot of those concerns directly. Their new CTO hire is genuinely impressive, and I'd love to get your read on whether this moves the needle for you. Would you have 30 minutes next week to reconnect — maybe Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon? Let me know what works and I can send a calendar invite.
